ecarx.carext.connect.net.wifi

Interface IExternalWifiAp

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface IExternalWifiAp
extends BaseAPI
    This class provides the API for managing Wi-Fi ap connectivity provided by external hardware.
    Since:
    4

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLED
      Wi-Fi AP is disabled.
      static int WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLING
      Wi-Fi AP is currently being disabled.
      static int WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLED
      Wi-Fi AP is enabled.
      static int WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLING
      Wi-Fi AP is currently being enabled.
      static int WIFI_AP_STATE_FAILED
      Wi-Fi AP is in a failed state.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default java.util.List<ApClient> getConnectedClients()
      Get the currently connected clients.
      default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus()
      Get current function status.
      default android.net.wifi.SoftApConfiguration getSoftApConfiguration()
      Gets the Wi-Fi tethered AP Configuration.
      default int getWifiApState()
      Gets the tethered Wi-Fi hotspot enabled state.
      default boolean isWifiApEnabled()
      Return whether tethered Wi-Fi AP is enabled or disabled.
      default boolean query5GMode()
      5G mode switch status.
      default boolean registerApClientListener(ApClientListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain connected clients change event.
      default boolean registerApConfigurationListener(ApConfigurationListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain configuration change event.
      default boolean registerApStateListener(ApStateListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain state change event.
      default boolean set5GMode(boolean enable)
      Set 5G mode switch status.
      default boolean setSoftApConfiguration(android.net.wifi.SoftApConfiguration softApConfig)
      Sets the tethered Wi-Fi AP Configuration.
      default boolean startTetheredHotspot(android.net.wifi.SoftApConfiguration softApConfig)
      Start Soft AP (hotspot) mode for tethering purposes with the specified configuration.
      default boolean stopSoftAp()
      Stop SoftAp mode.
      default void unregisterApClientListener(ApClientListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.
      default void unregisterApConfigurationListener(ApConfigurationListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.
      default void unregisterApStateListener(ApStateListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        init, onRelease

    • Field Detail

      • WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLING

        static final int WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLING
        Wi-Fi AP is currently being disabled. The state will change to WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLED if it finishes successfully.
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        getWifiApState(), Constant Field Values

      • WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLED

        static final int WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLED
        Wi-Fi AP is disabled.
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        getWifiApState(), Constant Field Values

      • WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLING

        static final int WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLING
        Wi-Fi AP is currently being enabled. The state will change to WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLED if it finishes successfully.
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        getWifiApState(), Constant Field Values

      • WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLED

        static final int WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLED
        Wi-Fi AP is enabled.
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        getWifiApState(), Constant Field Values

      • WIFI_AP_STATE_FAILED

        static final int WIFI_AP_STATE_FAILED
        Wi-Fi AP is in a failed state. This state will occur when an error occurs during enabling or disabling
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        getWifiApState(), Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • getFunctionStatus

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_AP")
default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus()
        Get current function status.
        Since:
        4

      • getWifiApState

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_AP")
default int getWifiApState()
        Gets the tethered Wi-Fi hotspot enabled state.
        Returns:
        One of WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLED, WIFI_AP_STATE_DISABLING, WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLED, WIFI_AP_STATE_ENABLING, WIFI_AP_STATE_FAILED
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        isWifiApEnabled()

      • isWifiApEnabled

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_AP")
default boolean isWifiApEnabled()
        Return whether tethered Wi-Fi AP is enabled or disabled.
        Returns:
        true if tethered Wi-Fi AP is enabled
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        getWifiApState()

      • registerApStateListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_AP")
default boolean registerApStateListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                             ApStateListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain state change event.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that will run.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.
        Since:
        4

      • unregisterApStateListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_AP")
default void unregisterApStateListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                            ApStateListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that don't want to receive event.
        Since:
        4

      • startTetheredHotspot

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default boolean startTetheredHotspot(@Nullable
                                                                                                          android.net.wifi.SoftApConfiguration softApConfig)
        Start Soft AP (hotspot) mode for tethering purposes with the specified configuration. Note that starting Soft AP mode may disable station mode operation if the device does not support concurrency.
        Parameters:
        softApConfig - A valid SoftApConfiguration specifying the configuration of the SAP, or null to use the persisted Soft AP configuration that was previously set using setSoftApConfiguration(SoftApConfiguration).
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise
        Since:
        4

      • stopSoftAp

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default boolean stopSoftAp()
        Stop SoftAp mode. Note that stopping softap mode will restore the previous wifi mode.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeds, false otherwise
        Since:
        4

      • getSoftApConfiguration

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default android.net.wifi.SoftApConfiguration getSoftApConfiguration()
        Gets the Wi-Fi tethered AP Configuration.
        Returns:
        AP details in SoftApConfiguration
        Since:
        4

      • setSoftApConfiguration

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default boolean setSoftApConfiguration(@NonNull
                                                                                                            android.net.wifi.SoftApConfiguration softApConfig)
        Sets the tethered Wi-Fi AP Configuration.
        Parameters:
        softApConfig - A valid SoftApConfiguration specifying the configuration of the SAP.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise
        Since:
        4

      • registerApConfigurationListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default boolean registerApConfigurationListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                     ApConfigurationListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain configuration change event.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that will run.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.
        Since:
        4

      • unregisterApConfigurationListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default void unregisterApConfigurationListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                    ApConfigurationListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that don't want to receive event.
        Since:
        4

      • getConnectedClients

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default java.util.List<ApClient> getConnectedClients()
        Get the currently connected clients.
        Returns:
        the currently connected clients.
        Since:
        4

      • registerApClientListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default boolean registerApClientListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                              ApClientListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain connected clients change event.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that will run.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.
        Since:
        4

      • unregisterApClientListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default void unregisterApClientListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                             ApClientListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that don't want to receive event.
        Since:
        4

      • query5GMode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default boolean query5GMode()
        5G mode switch status.
        Returns:
        true--5G on, false--5G off.
        Since:
        7

      • set5GMode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_AP")
default boolean set5GMode(boolean enable)
        Set 5G mode switch status.
        Parameters:
        enable - true--5G on, false--5G off.
        Since:
        7
